title: Cannot get InitialFit to work for data_noSignal Impacts

posts.name: Alexis Kalogeropoulos
posts.text:
Dear experts
I am trying to get the impacts with real_data + no_signal from the analysis CRs. However, no matter what strategy/tollerance etc I have tried, the initial fit always fails. For instance I run
combineTool.py -M Impacts -d input_Run2_3000_CR1B2B.root -n CR_t0_real --setParameters r=0 --freezeParameters r  --rMin -5 --rMax 5 --robustFit 1 --cminDefaultMinimizerTolerance 0.05 --X-rtd MINIMIZER_analytic --X-rtd FITTER_NEW_CROSSING_ALGO --cminDefaultMinimizerStrategy 1 -m 3000  -n CR_t0_real --doInitialFit --expectSignal 0 --saveWorkspace
and then I tried different strategies, rMin/rMax, remove robustFit etc - all fail
Could you please advise?
The datacard and the input_Run2_3000_CR1B2B.root that I use can be found under /afs/cern.ch/user/a/alkaloge/public/Combine

posts.name: Giacomo Ortona
posts.text:
Dear Alexis,
Have you tried removing teh freezeParameters r option? As far as I can see, you are left without any POI in the fit with the command you are using
Cheers,
Giacomo

posts.name: Alexis Kalogeropoulos
posts.text:
yes, even
combineTool.py -M Impacts -d input_Run2_3000_CR1B2B.root -n CR_t0_real --setParameters r=0   --rMin -5 --rMax 5 --robustFit 1 --cminDefaultMinimizerTolerance 0.05 --X-rtd MINIMIZER_analytic --X-rtd FITTER_NEW_CROSSING_ALGO --cminDefaultMinimizerStrategy 1 -m 3000  -n CR_t0_real --doInitialFit --expectSignal 0 --saveWorkspace
(i.e. removing the  freezeParameters r as proposed)
fails
Thanks
-a

posts.name: Giacomo Ortona
posts.text:
Dear Alexis,
Does the fit work in the 4 input datacards separately?
Also, since the expected fit seems to be working nicely, do you have some plots showing the data/MC agreement in the 4 regions?
Thank you,
Best,
Giacomo
